overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned post-Soviet town square in a video game, featuring overgrown brutalist architecture, a decaying cinema named Prometheus, and a gloomy overcast atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned monument plaza with concrete planters

events.description: large winged statue passes out of frame to the right

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the abandoned plaza, observing the surroundings and passing the statue

entered.detail: dark stone statue of winged figure on rectangular pedestal
large rectangular concrete planter with dead vegetation
multi-story concrete residential building visible through the trees
tall curved street lamp post with dual lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gloomy abandoned plaza with a large winged statue on the right. The camera moves forward past concrete planters and street lamps, with a distant apartment block visible through sparse trees. The atmosphere is desolate and overcast.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown public square approaching cinema building

events.description: cinema building becomes visible on the left horizon as camera advances

agents.ego_description: continuing through the overgrown plaza toward the distant cinema building

entered.detail: low-rise brutalist cinema building with flat roof visible in the distance
small tree with brown autumn leaves in the plaza center
broken concrete walls and foundation remains

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the abandoned square, the camera passes through overgrown vegetation and concrete ruins. The cinema building gradually emerges on the left horizon while the statue recedes behind. The plaza is littered with debris and dead foliage.

events.description: camera turns left to face the cinema building facade directly

agents.ego_description: approaching the cinema building to inspect the facade and entrance area

entered.detail: large metal letters spelling КИНОТЕАТР ПРОМЕТЕЙ on building roof
rusted metal fence fragment lying on the ground
distant high-rise concrete apartment building behind the cinema

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the abandoned cinema building, turning to face the facade with its prominent Cyrillic signage reading 'КИНОТЕАТР ПРОМЕТЕЙ'. The building's brutalist concrete architecture dominates the left side of the frame, with broken windows and decaying walls, while a distant apartment tower looms in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, overcast plaza that gradually converges on the decaying facade of a brutalist cinema. It begins by gliding past a large winged statue and concrete planters, moving forward through a gloomy square where a distant apartment block is visible through sparse trees. As the camera pushes deeper into the plaza, the statue recedes and the path becomes cluttered with debris and overgrown vegetation, allowing the silhouette of a building to emerge on the left horizon. The scene then shifts as the camera turns toward the imposing concrete structure, finally coming to a halt before the broken windows and weathered walls of the cinema, marked by prominent Cyrillic signage reading КИНОТЕАТР ПРОМЕТЕЙ.
